name: School Bus One LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Logan Elm Local Schools / Hocking-Pickaway County area (Laurelville, OH)
recent_news: No M&A or news; owner Phil Downs is a longtime school-transportation operator based in Laurelville, OH per LinkedIn; spouse Shirley Downs obit (2022) references their Laurelville home since 1999, suggesting an aging owner-operator.
fit_notes: Marginal fit. Independent, family-run school-bus contractor in rural OH with likely Logan Elm exposure; aging owner suggests succession potential, but very small (~9 employees, ~$244K revenue, ~5 buses) — best as a small bolt-on if Summit already operates in central/southern Ohio.

name: JS Hawkins & Sons Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Allegany County Public Schools (Cumberland, MD area)
recent_news: No press or M&A; Manta lists JS Hawkins & Sons Inc as a school-bus transportation service at 12117 Lotus Ave, Cumberland, MD; MSBCA membership likely. No recent ownership change identified.
fit_notes: Marginal fit. Small family-owned ('& Sons') school-bus contractor in western Maryland (Allegany County); typical MSBCA owner-operator profile with succession potential, but ~$241K revenue / ~7 employees / ~4 buses makes this a very small tuck-in — only worthwhile if Summit is consolidating Allegany County routes.
